# MuleSoft Microsoft Teams Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.1) of Microsoft Teams Connector documentation.
> See [Microsoft Teams Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-teams-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Microsoft Teams Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Microsoft Teams Connector 1.1](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-teams-connector/latest/index.md)
- [Microsoft Teams Connector 1.1 Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-teams-connector/latest/microsoft-teams-connector-examples.md)
- [Microsoft Teams Connector 1.1 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-teams-connector/latest/microsoft-teams-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Microsoft Teams Connector 1.1](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-teams-connector/latest/microsoft-teams-connector-studio.md)
- [Microsoft Teams Connector 1.1 XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-teams-connector/latest/microsoft-teams-connector-xml-maven.md)
